name: Karrie

passive.name: Lightwheel Mark
passive.description: Karrie's Basic Attacks and skills apply a stack of (Lightwheel Mark) on hit. Once a target has 5 stacks of (Lightwheel Marks), the marks will turn into a lightwheel, dealing (True Damage) equal to 5( +1% Extra Physical Attack)% of the target's Max HP to them (only up to 300 damage against Creeps).
passive.tips: Because this passive skill deal percentage damage instead of static damage , it is best used to enemy with high health . The bigger the maximum HP , the bigger the damage.

skill1.name: Spinning Lightwheel
skill1.description: Karrie releases a sphere of surging energy in the target direction, dealing 250( +90% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in its path. The sphere will stop upon hitting an enemy hero or reaching its max travel distance, continuously dealing 150( +20% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to nearby enemies and slowing them by 80% for 1s.
skill1.tips: This skill is really useful to fight against a crowd of minion , because it will do damage to minion with / without your presence , especially when the enemy is surrounding the minion and you cannot use basic attack to hit them . It is also effective against Lord and Holy Lord that is going toward your turret because it will slow his movement speed , allowing you to kill him before he can do damage .

skill2.name: Phantom Step
skill2.description: Karrie dashes in the target direction while throwing a lightwheel at the nearest enemy, dealing 150( +70% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and applying a stack of (Lightwheel Mark) on them. When in (Dual Wield) state, Karrie throws two lightwheels instead.
skill2.tips: When it comes to battle , this skill is really good at creating distance between you with your enemy or to dodge their attack while damaging them , but be careful , any mistake when using this skill will only make you become closer to your enemy and allowing them to kill you easier .

ultimate.name: Speedy Lightwheel
ultimate.description: Karrie enters (Dual Wield) state for 6s, during which she gains 20% Movement Speed and throws two lightwheels with each Basic Attack, each dealing 50% Basic Attack damage and inheriting a portion of Attack Effects.
ultimate.tips: Usually , using this skill at max level to the enemy is equal with normal basic attack , but if your enemy maximum HP is really big , this skill is very deadly , so remember to not use this skill to enemy with low maximum HP and only use it when you are fighting against enemy with big maximum HP .

mechanicNote: Karrie adalah marksman dengan DPS tinggi yang menjadi win condition utama di late game.
